failure_movement.justification: Prev clusters were null, so no real prev->actual delta exists; prediction claims generation+truncation failures shrink but cannot be confirmed directionally. Actual clusters: correct 38, empty 25, unknown 33, wrong 4. The implied 'unknown shrinks' is plausible given strengthened prompt, yet unknown remains the largest failure (33). Partial credit for vague, unverifiable direction.

trace_movement.justification: prompt_tokens 'roughly similar' is plausible (1637.5) but unverifiable without prior. Claim retrieved docs rise to ~5-7 is unverifiable: retrieved[] holds 14-20 entries incl. summary tiers, giving no post-truncation fit count. No prior baseline confirms any delta. Conservative credit for plausible, unconfirmed claims.

side_effects.justification: Flagged truncation cutting end-of-passage answers and new in-context-loss failures; 25 empty + 33 unknown failures exist but with null prior these cannot be confirmed as new regressions. Falsification threshold (passrate<0.20) correctly did NOT trigger (0.38), a held risk call. Partial credit; main risk unverifiable.
